title: Unchanged variables should be marked as const
description: Unchanged variables should be marked as "const"Analyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEes2015Why is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoIf a variable that is not supposed to change is not marked asconst, it could be accidentally reassigned elsewhere in the code, leading to unexpected behavior and bugs that can be hard to track down.By declaring a variable asconst, you ensure that its value remains constant throughout the code. It also signals to other developers that this value is intended to remain constant. This can make the code easier to understand and maintain.In some cases, usingconstcan lead to performance improvements. NOTE: This regex-based implementation has limitations and may produce false positives. For accurate detection, use proper AST-based static analysis tools.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Variable declared with 'let' or 'var' is assigned a literal value. Consider using 'const' if not reassigned later. (Heuristic check - may have false positives)
